name: hypr-video-cli
description: A Claude Code Skill for creating programmatic videos with CLI — render MP4 from JSON with animations, transitions, captions, keyframes, and 50+ visual effects

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "require('fs').existsSync('dist/render-video.mjs') || (console.error('dist/render-video.mjs not found — build first'), process.exit(1))"
